title: EvilProxy Credential Harvest & Account Takeover Replay

events.detail: Phishing email with EvilProxy link mimicking Microsoft 365 login
Victim authenticates through EvilProxy reverse proxy; session token captured
MFA push approved by victim; full session cookie intercepted
Attacker replays stolen session token from different IP/location
Inbox forwarding rule created to external address
CLAW: Sessions revoked, password reset, inbox rules removed
